label: Stat part (bed stat)
description: Scales the stat based on a StatDef read from the pawn's current bed.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

stat.label: Stat
stat.description: StatDef evaluated on the pawn's current bed to produce the modifier.
